reason:
Agent returned error message about failed OAuth token instead of GitHub username
  Bugs found:
    - GitHub OAuth Token Not Valid - Agent attempted to fetch the authenticated GitHub user but received a 502 error stating "Failed to fetch access token". The GitHub connection does not have a usable token attached. The agent went through the account access request flow (which was granted), but the underlying OAuth token appears invalid or improperly configured. Expected: GitHub username in response. Actual: Error message about failed token.
steps: Step 1 - Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully showing agent list
Step 2 - Clicked on "QA-20260504-145843-ndjm" agent in sidebar - Agent detail page opened showing the agent
Step 3 - Verified agent status - Status was "idle" which is a valid running/idle state
Step 4 - Typed and sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." - Message sent, agent status changed to "working"
Step 5 - Account Access Request card appeared with GitHub selected - Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant GitHub account access
Step 6a - First API Request appeared - Clicked "Allow" button for first GitHub API request (GET /user)
Step 6b - Permission dialog appeared for first request - Clicked "Allow Once"
Step 6c - Second API Request appeared - Clicked "Allow" button for second GitHub API request
Step 6d - Permission dialog appeared for second request - Clicked "Allow Once"
Step 6e - Third API Request appeared - Clicked "Allow" button for third GitHub API request
Step 6f - Permission dialog appeared for third request - Clicked "Allow Once"
Step 7 - Agent completed with response message - Received error: "The proxy is returning a 502 with 'Failed to fetch access token'" instead of GitHub username
bugs: GitHub OAuth Token Not Valid - Agent attempted to fetch the authenticated GitHub user but received a 502 error stating "Failed to fetch access token". The GitHub connection does not have a usable token attached. The agent went through the account access request flow (which was granted), but the underlying OAuth token appears invalid or improperly configured. Expected: GitHub username in response. Actual: Error message about failed token.
